name: gradient-heading
description: Heading component with gradient text effects and customizable styling

registry_item.name: gradient-heading
registry_item.description: Heading component with gradient text effects and customizable styling

visual_summary: Gradient Heading is a styled heading component that can be customized with various gradient colors and text sizes. It can be used in places where a prominent heading is required. A developer would use this component when they need to highlight a section or a title with a visually appealing gradient effect.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready heading component with the following characteristics:

Name: gradient-heading
Description: Gradient Heading is a styled heading component that can be customized with various gradient colors and text sizes. It can be used in places where a prominent heading is required. A developer would use this component when they need to highlight a section or a title with a visually appealing gradient effect.
Style: glassmorphism, gradient
Interactions: hover, focus
Tags: UI Component, Heading, Customizable

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
